summary: Comprehensive UI testing of 4 NEW features for AutoML Master client-side app. Fixed critical localStorage persistence bug (race condition). All features working correctly.
passed_tests: FEATURE 1 - Universal Analysis Engine: Loan Approval dataset → Classification detected
FEATURE 1 - Universal Analysis Engine: House Prices dataset → Regression detected
FEATURE 1 - Universal Analysis Engine: No target selected → Clustering recommended
FEATURE 1 - Dataset Profile Card shows column types, stats, unique values, ranges
FEATURE 1 - Task Suggestion banner with 'Go to Clustering' button
FEATURE 2 - K-Means Clustering: Config card with k-slider and Run button
FEATURE 2 - K-Means Clustering: Cluster stat cards (cluster-stat-0/1/2) showing sizes
FEATURE 2 - K-Means Clustering: Scatter chart with color-coded clusters
FEATURE 2 - K-Means Clustering: Cluster means table
FEATURE 2 - Mini data upload prompt when no data loaded
FEATURE 3 - Anomaly Detection: Z-Score method working
FEATURE 3 - Anomaly Detection: IQR method working (2 anomalies found in Insurance data)
FEATURE 3 - Anomaly Detection: Scatter chart (normal vs anomaly points)
FEATURE 3 - Anomaly Detection: Per-column bar chart
FEATURE 3 - Anomaly Detection: Anomalous rows table
FEATURE 4 - localStorage Persistence: Models saved to localStorage
FEATURE 4 - localStorage Persistence: Models restored after page reload (FIXED BUG)
Navigation: All 6 tabs work (Dashboard, Analysis, Predictions, Clusters, Anomalies, Model Library)
Previous Fix #1: Predictions tab shows 'No trained model available' warning
Previous Fix #3: Dashboard metrics show 0 when no models
Previous Fix #4: Trends show N/A when value is 0

bugs_fixed.description: localStorage persistence race condition - models were being cleared on page load
bugs_fixed.root_cause: useEffect for saving to localStorage ran immediately with empty models array on mount, overwriting saved data before load useEffect could restore it
bugs_fixed.fix: Added hasLoadedFromStorage flag to prevent saving until after initial load attempt completes

critical_code_review_comments: localStorage persistence now works correctly after fix
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for new features
K-Means clustering using ml-kmeans library works well in browser
Anomaly detection with both Z-Score and IQR methods functional
seed_data_creation: Used sample datasets: Loan Approval (classification), House Prices (regression), Insurance Costs (clustering/anomaly detection)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 new features verified working: (1) Universal Analysis Engine with auto task suggestion, (2) K-Means Clustering dashboard, (3) Anomaly Detection with Z-Score/IQR, (4) localStorage persistence (FIXED race condition bug). Previous 5 bug fixes still working. App is 100% client-side.
rca_of_the_issue: localStorage persistence bug: The save useEffect was triggering immediately on mount with the initial empty models array, overwriting any saved data in localStorage before the load useEffect could run. Fixed by adding a hasLoadedFromStorage state flag that prevents saving until initial load is complete.
